channel.title: Blasts on amardeepsidhu.com
channel.description: Recent content in Blasts on amardeepsidhu.com

item.title: And now its Delhi...
item.description: Yesterday, I had gone to office and came back at around 6. After half an hour one of my friend called to ask “Where are you ? All fine ?” And then i came to know that there had been serial blasts in Delhi. I switched on the TV and there was blood all around at all the blast sites. People were rushing around and moreover it was getting darker so help, search and other things were becoming difficult. Well, an unfortunate day for Delhi.
